ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample. */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Source name of the sample. */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the sample was taken. */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism from which the sample was taken. */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease associated with the sample. */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the organism. */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the organism. */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected. */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored. */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, blood, serum). */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the source of the sample (e.g., patient ID). */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample (e.g., available, used, archived). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay. */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample associated with the assay. */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay performed. */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of technology used for the assay. */,
  "assay_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay was performed. */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the researcher who performed the assay. */,
  "protocol_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the protocol used in the assay. */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assay. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assays_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification. */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the modification. */,
  "modification_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the modification applied during the assay. */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was applied. */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., chemical, enzymatic). */,
  "modification_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modification process. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file. */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the data file. */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file. */,
  "file_uri" TEXT /* Universal Resource Identifier (URI) for the data file. */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., raw, processed). */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the data file. */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify file integrity. */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replicates" (
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replicate. */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the replicate. */,
  "replicate_type" TEXT /* Type of replicate (biological or technical). */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the replicate. */,
  "replicate_date" TEXT /* Date when the replicate was created. */,
  "replicate_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the replicate. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replicates_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleavage_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleavage agent. */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the cleavage agent. */,
  "cleavage_agent_details" TEXT /* Details of the cleavage agent used. */,
  "cleavage_date" TEXT /* Date when the cleavage agent was used. */,
  "cleavage_concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the cleavage agent used. */,
  "cleavage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the cleavage agent was applied. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleavage_agents_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument. */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the instrument. */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument used. */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument. */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument. */,
  "instrument_location" TEXT /* Location where the instrument is housed. */,
  "instrument_calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the instrument. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_windows" (
  "window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan window. */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assay associated with the scan window. */,
  "lower_limit" TEXT /* Lower limit of the scan window. */,
  "upper_limit" TEXT /* Upper limit of the scan window. */,
  "scan_window_type" TEXT /* Type of scan window (e.g., MS1, MS2). */,
  "scan_window_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the scan window. */,
  "scan_window_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the scan window. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_windows_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)
